info.title: SPC Online Academy API
info.description: REST API for SPC Online Academy — a medical education platform. All endpoints are prefixed with `/api/v1`.

post.description: Creates a new student or instructor account and returns an auth token.
Authenticates a user by email/phone and password. The role must match the user's actual role.
Revokes the current authentication token.

get.description: Returns the current user with instructor profile if applicable.

post.description: Deletes the current token and issues a new one.
Sends a password reset link to the provided email address.
Resets the password using a token received via email. All existing tokens are revoked.

get.description: Returns cart items, applied promo code, and calculated totals.

delete.description: Removes all items and applied promo code.

post.description: Adds a published course to the cart. Validates course is not already in cart and student is not already enrolled.

422.description: Already enrolled or already in cart

post.description: Validates and applies a promo code. Checks: active, not expired, not max used, min purchase met.

422.description: Invalid, expired, or max uses reached

post.description: Creates a pending order from the cart, initiates a Paymob payment session, and returns a payment URL. The user should be redirected to the payment_url to complete payment. Enrollments are created only after successful payment (via webhook/callback). Clears cart items after order creation.

201.description: Order created, redirect user to payment URL

get.description: Returns quiz with questions and options. is_correct is NOT included (to prevent cheating). Student must be enrolled.

post.description: Grades answers, calculates score, determines pass/fail. If passed, marks lesson complete and may generate certificate.

answers.description: Map of question_id to selected option label (A/B/C/D)

put.description: Updates user profile. Instructors can also update bio, specialization, qualifications, education, expertise, and social links.

avatar.description: Image file (jpeg, png, jpg, gif, webp). Max 2MB.

get.description: Returns cached (1 hour) platform-wide statistics: active students, total courses, total instructors, average rating.
Returns top approved reviews (rating >= 4) with user name, avatar, title and course title.
Returns all active instructors with specialization, courses count, total students, and average rating.
Returns category details with courses count, total students, featured videos count, and courses list.
Returns paginated free video lessons within a category with search and sorting.

get.summary: Get page content (FAQ, Terms, Privacy, About)
get.description: Returns page content by slug. For "faq" returns questions grouped by category. For "terms" and "privacy" returns HTML content. For "about" returns structured about page data.

parameters.name: slug
parameters.description: Page slug: faq, terms, privacy, or about

categories.description: Only for faq slug - questions grouped by category

content.description: Only for terms/privacy slugs - HTML content

description.example: All our courses are rooted in...

post.description: Subscribe to notifications for new courses in a category.

delete.description: Unsubscribe from notifications for a category.

get.description: Downloads the subscription invoice as a PDF file.

403.description: Subscription does not belong to you

get.description: Downloads all instructor transactions as a CSV file.

get.summary: List enrolled students for a course
get.description: Returns paginated list of students enrolled in the instructor's course with their progress.

403.description: Course does not belong to you

get.description: Returns revenue, student count, rating, course count, revenue growth, and recent reviews.
Returns all courses owned by the instructor (including unpublished).
Returns full course detail with modules, lessons, reviews. Only own courses.

put.description: Updates course. All fields optional. Only the course owner can update.

post.description: Creates a new quiz, optionally with inline questions and options.

get.description: Returns quiz details with all questions and options (including is_correct).

post.description: Adds a question with exactly 4 options (A, B, C, D) and 1 correct answer.

422.description: Must have exactly one correct answer

get.description: Returns available balance, pending clearance, and lifetime earnings.

post.description: Submits a payout request. Amount must not exceed available balance.

get.description: Returns bundle course details with included courses.
Returns a paginated list of courses the student has wishlisted.

post.description: Adds a course to the student's wishlist.

delete.description: Removes a course from the student's wishlist.

get.description: Returns the student's current video playback position for a lesson.

put.description: Saves the student's current video playback position for a lesson.

get.description: Returns all notes the student has created for a specific lesson.

post.description: Creates a new note for a specific lesson.

put.description: Updates an existing note owned by the student.

delete.description: Deletes a note owned by the student.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of the student's notifications.

message.example: Congratulations! You have completed React Fundamentals.

get.description: Returns the number of unread notifications.

put.description: Marks a single notification as read.
Marks all unread notifications as read.

get.description: Returns the student's notification preference settings.

put.description: Updates the student's notification preference settings.

get.description: Returns a list of devices (active sessions/tokens) for the student.

delete.description: Revokes a specific device session (deletes the token). Cannot revoke the current device.

post.description: Submits a refund request for a completed order.

reason.example: Course content did not match description.

refund_reason.example: Course content did not match description.

422.description: Refund already requested or validation error

get.description: Returns detailed analytics data for a specific course owned by the instructor.

post.description: Uploads a downloadable resource file for a lesson. Accepts pdf, doc, docx, ppt, pptx, xls, xlsx, zip. Max 10MB.

delete.description: Deletes a lesson resource and its file from storage.

post.description: Adds an existing course as an item within a bundle course. The target course must be a bundle (is_bundle = true).

course_id.description: Course ID to add to the bundle

422.description: Not a bundle or validation error

delete.description: Removes a course from a bundle.

put.description: Reorders the courses within a bundle.

order.description: Array of bundle item IDs in the new order

post.description: Server-to-server webhook called by Paymob after payment processing. Verifies HMAC signature from the payload. On success: updates order to completed, creates Enrollments and InstructorTransactions, increments promo code usage. On failure: marks order as failed. Logs all payment attempts to payment_logs table.

requestBody.description: Paymob webhook payload with transaction object

get.description: Browser redirect endpoint after payment on Paymob. Receives payment result as query parameters, verifies HMAC, and redirects the user to the frontend success or failure page. Also completes the order as a fallback if the webhook has not arrived yet. No authentication required.

302.description: Redirects to frontend success page (/checkout/success?order_number=ORD-xxx) or failure page (/checkout/failed?order_number=ORD-xxx)

post.description: Queries Paymob API to verify payment status for a pending order. Use this when the webhook/callback has not updated the order status yet. If payment is confirmed, completes the order (creates enrollments and instructor transactions). Only the order owner can verify their own orders.

already_completed.description: Present when order was already completed before this request

502.description: Failed to inquire order from Paymob

post.description: Students can message instructors of enrolled courses. Instructors can message their students.

body.example: Dr., I have a question about...

get.summary: Get conversation thread with a user

post.description: Generates a 24-hour download token. Max 5 active downloads.

get.description: Redirects the user to the Google or Facebook OAuth authorization page.

302.description: Redirect to OAuth provider consent screen

get.description: Handles the OAuth callback after user authorization. Creates or links the user account and returns an auth token.

post.description: Accepts an access token obtained directly from the OAuth provider (Google/Facebook) and returns an API auth token. Ideal for SPA and mobile clients.

access_token.description: Access token from the OAuth provider

get.description: Returns a boolean map of all feature flags indicating which features are enabled or disabled.

delete.description: Permanently deletes the authenticated user's account with GDPR-compliant data anonymization. Requires password confirmation.

message.example: Account deleted successfully. Your data has been anonymized.

get.description: Downloads the certificate as a PDF file. Returns binary PDF content with Content-Disposition: attachment.

403.description: Certificate does not belong to you

get.description: Renders the certificate PDF inline in the browser. Returns binary PDF content with Content-Disposition: inline.

403.description: Certificate does not belong to you

get.description: Returns paginated published courses with filtering, searching, and sorting.
Returns up to 8 featured published courses, ordered by newest first.
Returns full course detail by slug, including modules, lessons, reviews count, and instructor info.

200.description: Course detail with modules and lessons

get.description: Returns all categories with their course count, ordered by sort_order.
Returns public instructor profile with their published courses.
Returns all active subscription plans ordered by duration_months.

post.description: Submits a contact message from the website contact form.

message.example: I would like to know about the cardiology course...
Your message has been sent successfully. We will get back to you soon.

get.description: Returns all public site settings. Sensitive settings (payment keys, platform fee) are excluded.
Returns summary statistics and up to 3 in-progress courses for "continue learning".

continue_learning.description: Up to 3 most recently active enrollments

get.description: Returns paginated list of enrolled courses with filtering and search.
Returns full course content for the player, including modules, lessons, and completion status. Student must be enrolled.

200.description: Course player data with modules, lessons, and completion status

post.description: Marks a lesson as completed. Recalculates progress. If 100% and all quizzes passed, generates certificate.

get.description: Returns detailed progress including completed lesson list for a specific course.
Returns all certificates earned by the authenticated student.
Returns certificate details with download URL. Only accessible by the certificate owner.

post.description: Subscribes the student to a plan. End date is auto-calculated.
Cancels an active subscription. Sets status to cancelled and disables auto-renew.

200.description: Order details with items and billing

get.description: Returns all reviews submitted by the authenticated student.

post.description: Creates a new review or updates existing. One review per course. Must be enrolled.
